content.speakerText: Thanks for listening. I feel a bit better.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你听我说，我感觉好多了。

options.text: Anytime. I'm just a text away.
That's good. I have to go now.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Anytime. I'm just a text away.' 用具体承诺（随时可联系）强化了支持感，符合'温和告别'场景的核心目标。其他选项虽然语法正确，但显得冷淡或 abrupt，缺乏情感延续性，不符合'留下持续支持感'的要求。

content.speakerText: I really appreciate you being there for me today.
content.speakerTextCn: 我很感激你今天一直陪在我身边。

options.text: I'm always here if you need to talk.
You're welcome. Have a nice day!

content.explanation: 正确答案 'I'm always here if you need to talk.' 传递了持续支持的承诺，是温和告别中的理想回应。其他选项要么轻描淡写（'no big deal'），要么模糊结束（'see you around'），或仅机械回应（'have a nice day'），未能建立情感连接。

content.speakerText: Talking to you helped me clear my head.
content.speakerTextCn: 和你聊天让我理清了思路。

options.text: Cool. I'm off to work now.
I'm glad I could help. Let's catch up again soon?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'I'm glad I could help. Let's catch up again soon?' 既表达了共情，又用具体邀约（'catch up again soon'）延续关系，符合温和告别原则。其他选项要么缺乏回应（'yeah, me too'），要么直接结束对话（'I'm off to work'），未能体现支持感的持续性。

content.template: Thanks for listening. I feel a bit better. — Anytime. I'm just a ___ away.
content.hint: 表达‘随时可联系’的常用口语表达
content.knowledgePoint: 固定搭配：a text away（随时发消息即可）

content.template: I'm really glad I could help. Let's ___ coffee this weekend?
content.hint: 邀请对方共进饮品时的常用动词
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：have coffee（约定见面的自然表达）

content.template: You're not alone — I'm always here if you need to ___.
content.hint: 表达‘需要倾诉’时的核心动词
content.knowledgePoint: 场景核心动词：talk（表达情感支持时的高频词）

content.speakerText: Thanks for listening. I feel a bit better.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你听我说，我感觉好多了。
expectedAnswers: Anytime. I'm just a text away.
I'm so glad I could help. Let's grab coffee next week?
No problem at all — you can always reach out if you need to vent.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了持续支持而非简单结束对话
语言准确性：语法正确，用词自然，无中式英语
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者温和告别习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'text away', 'reach out', 'grab coffee' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I really needed to talk to someone today.
content.speakerTextCn: 我今天真的很需要找人聊聊。
expectedAnswers: I'm so glad you reached out. I'm here whenever you need me.
That means a lot. Let me know if you want to chat again this week?
You don't have to go through this alone — I've got your back.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否传递了安全、持续的支持感
语言准确性：使用了恰当的口语表达，如 'reached out', 'got your back'
表达自然度：语气温暖、不夸张，符合亲密对话语境
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'here for you', 'chat', 'reached out' 等核心表达

content.speakerText: Talking to you made me feel less alone.
content.speakerTextCn: 和你聊天让我感觉没那么孤单了。
expectedAnswers: I'm really glad I could be there for you. You're not alone — ever.
That means the world to me. Let's keep checking in with each other?
I'm here, always. Even if it's just a quick text at midnight.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否强化了情感连接并承诺持续支持
语言准确性：语法结构完整，无错误搭配
表达自然度：语气真诚、有温度，避免机械回应
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'be there for you', 'checking in', 'text at midnight' 等情感化表达
